ground_truth.title: Business School Reviews
ground_truth.main_content: Business School Reviews listing page featuring verified and authentic reviews from GMAT Club members. Featured schools include Yale with 38 reviews and 4.7 rating, UNC Kenan-Flagler with 15 reviews and 4.5 rating, Tuck with 15 reviews and 4.8 rating, and Emory Goizueta with 16 reviews and 3.9 rating. The comprehensive directory includes top business schools such as Booth (Chicago) with 34 reviews and 4.9 rating, Anderson (UCLA) with 45 reviews and 4.6 rating, Kellogg with 31 reviews and 4.7 rating, UVA Darden with 24 reviews and 4.8 rating, HBS with 24 reviews and 4.8 rating, Ross (Michigan) with 31 reviews and 4.7 rating, Duke Fuqua with 22 reviews and 4.7 rating, INSEAD with 25 reviews and 4.6 rating, Kelley with 24 reviews and 4.8 rating, Wharton with 27 reviews and 4.7 rating, LBS with 15 reviews and 4.6 rating, NTU with 25 reviews and 4.5 rating, Sloan (MIT) with 12 reviews and 5.0 rating, McCombs with 16 reviews and 4.4 rating, CBS with 20 reviews and 4.5 rating, ISB with 14 reviews and 4.5 rating, Johnson (Cornell) with 20 reviews and 3.9 rating, Berkeley Haas with 18 reviews and 4.8 rating, Tepper with 15 reviews and 4.9 rating, NYU Stern with 18 reviews and 4.7 rating, Stanford with 10 reviews and 4.9 rating, Owen with 13 reviews and 4.5 rating, Olin with 9 reviews and 4.1 rating, Carlson with 12 reviews and 4.8 rating, McDonough with 11 reviews and 4.5 rating, Mendoza with 8 reviews and 4.5 rating, Marshall with 11 reviews and 4.7 rating, Said with 7 reviews and 4.4 rating, Scheller with 10 reviews and 4.3 rating, Rotman with 11 reviews and 3.6 rating, Smith with 9 reviews and 4.3 rating, Simon with 8 reviews and 4.3 rating, Jones with 7 reviews and 3.7 rating, Foster with 7 reviews and 5.0 rating, CEIBS with 8 reviews and 4.9 rating. Additional schools listed include Mason, Babson, IESE, IIMC, Ivey, IE, W.P. Carey, BU, Schulich, HEC, ESADE, Merage, Hult, Desautels, Carey, NUS, EDHEC, Madison, Broad, Cox, Melbourne, Cambridge Judge, Katz, and Bocconi. Users can submit their own verified reviews through the provided link.
with: Business School Reviews from Students and Alumni who attended these MBA programs.
